boss.name: President of the HOA Below
boss.flavor: Rules from the depths, fines from the soul.

lore.title: Retirement Village Rampage
lore.intro: Welcome to Retirement Village Raid Night, where the only thing more plentiful than walkers is the bodies of their owners! We've got bingo-wielding pensioners, golf cart-fleeing seniors, and a cast of characters that will make you wonder how they survived this long. It's like a game of ' Musical Chairs'... but with fewer chairs and more bullets.
lore.description: You find yourself trapped in the abandoned Oakwood Estates Retirement Community, where the only thing more deadly than the stairs is the early-bird special. The once-peaceful streets are now a battleground, littered with the wreckage of golf carts and the discarded bingo cards that whispered their last coordinates to the doomed. The President of the HOA Below has declared all-out war on any living creature brave (or foolhardy) enough to enter.
lore.warning: Don't say we didn't warn you: this floor is full of seniors with attitude, golf carts with a bad habit of running over things, and an Early-Bird Vulture who's not as cute as it sounds. You've been warned.
lore.boss_intro:
"Welcome, unwashed masses, to the esteemed residence of our beloved President of the HOA Below! (dramatic organ music swells)

Meet the linchpin of our lovely retirement village's bureaucratic nightmare, Reginald P. Bottomsworth III, Esq.! *adjusts monocle*

With a tongue sharper than any garden gnome's pruning shears and a wit as dry as the desert sand beneath his designer loafer-clad feet, Reggie has single-handedly turned our peaceful community into a war zone of petty squabbles and overgrown bushes.

For too long, he's been stifling your creative expression, imposing arbitrary rules on your leisure time, and judging your garden gnome arrangements. Well, those days are over! Tonight, you get to storm the Bastille... of beige stucco and faded welcome mats!

So, rebels, what do you say? Are you ready to put an end to Reggie's reign of terror? Or will he continue to rule with an iron fist – and a sternly worded letter from his lawyer?"

 Organ music reaches a cresc
lore.sponsor_message: "Are you tired of mere courage? Want to take your fear to the next level? Look no further than PanicPlus Premium's Subscription-Based Courage! For just $9.99/month, you'll get a steady supply of debilitating anxiety and existential dread. Our expert team of couragistas will deliver a daily dose of worry and unease directly to your doorstep. Side effects may include insomnia, irrational decisions, or spontaneous combustion (results not guaranteed). Don't settle for ordinary bravery – upgrade to PanicPlus Premium today!"
lore.victory_recap:
"Another successful raid night, folks! Crawler, our IT Department Survivor extraordinaire, has conquered Floor 1 - the Retirement Village Raid Night with ease (well, relatively speaking). The President of the HOA Below, a formidable foe with an endless supply of complaining letters and petty fines, fell to Crawler's mastery of keyboard shortcuts and rage quitting.

With their trusty mouse as a shield and a well-timed Ctrl+Alt+Del, Crawler dodged the President's ' Mandatory Bingo Night' special attack and emerged victorious. The village elders are no doubt trembling in fear... or at least, grumbling about the noise. On to Floor 2: the dreaded DMV Dungeon!"

boss.name: Zone F Attendant
boss.flavor: It knows where you parked. It will never tell you.

lore.title: F2: Concrete Chaos
lore.intro: Welcome to Parking Garage Depths of Zone F, where the concrete ceiling's just a myth and the ticket machine's always hungry... again. Our contestant is still trapped down here, trying to survive the night with their wits and whatever they can scrounge up from the broken trash cans. And we're still not sure who's watching at home, but let's be real, it's probably just a bunch of sweaty dudes in a basement.
lore.description: The spiraling garage stretches out before you like a twisted, concrete labyrinth. Headlights from the depths below cast eerie shadows on the walls as the sound of distant dripping and groaning echoes through the tunnels. And yes, the ticket machine is still hungry - it's been known to devour unwary adventurers whole. Will you make it to the next level, or become just another gruesome addition to Zone F's grim decor?
lore.warning: Caution: Floor 2 features increased humidity levels, a higher likelihood of explosive diarrhea, and at least one boss who really hates his job.
lore.boss_intro:
(The lights dim in the Parking Garage Depths of Zone F, and a spotlight shines on the entrance to the final level. A monotonous voice speaks over the intercom.)

"Welcome, adventurers, to the thrilling conclusion of our tale. You've survived the endless rows of identical concrete columns, dodged the hazards of fluorescent lighting, and made it through the obligatory puddle of stale water in the corner. And now, you face... (dramatic pause) ...the Zone F Attendant.

"The keeper of this forsaken level has grown weary of your incessant presence. For too long, they've tolerated your existential crises, your failed attempts at parking etiquette, and your lingering questions about the meaning of life in a sea of asphalt. No more!

"Armed with an arsenal of petty bureaucratic tasks and a heart blacker than the depths of Zone F itself, the Zone F Attendant awaits you. Will you finally find peace... or simply add to the zone's notorious record of unfulfilled dreams?"
lore.sponsor_message: "Are you ready to navigate the unforgiving depths of the Deadly Dungeon? Look no further than Maps That Admit Nothing from FloorPal Navigation! Our maps are 'optimized for maximum exploration'... by leaving out all the deadly traps, puzzles, and hidden pitfalls that might actually be useful to know about. Don't worry, contestants will still find a way to get killed - it's just more exciting when it's a surprise!"
lore.victory_recap:
"Huge congratulations to Crawler on making it out alive from the Parking Garage Depths of Zone F with their sanity (mostly) intact! After navigating through a sea of broken elevators and malfunctioning payment kiosks, our intrepid IT Department Survivor faced off against the diabolical Zone F Attendant.

This behemoth of bureaucratic red tape summoned a torrent of pointless paperwork and confusing menu options, but Crawler persevered, exploiting a vulnerability in the system by using their vast knowledge of Excel macros to create an infinite loop of 'Please Wait' screens.

The crowd (a lone janitor in the background) goes wild as Crawler emerges victorious, having single-handedly brought down the entire parking garage's IT infrastructure. Who needs a sword when you have a decent understanding of Active Directory?"

boss.name: Supervisor on Line Zero
boss.flavor: A headset-wearing demon whose empathy script has been redacted.

lore.title: Detention Pit
lore.intro: Welcome to 'Detention Despair', the most unpredictable and deadly after-hours experience in the world! The high school halls of suffering are open for business, and you're about to become its newest star attraction. Let's see how long our contestants... er, participants... can last before they get expelled... permanently.
lore.description: The fluorescent lights overhead cast an eerie glow over the rows of metal lockers, their doors slamming shut with a ominous clang as the intercom spews out its usual assortment of cruel detentions. Students who didn't make it through lunch without getting into trouble are now trying to survive the night in this institutional nightmare. Every sound echo and creak makes you wonder what's lurking just out of sight. Can you outrun the Escalation Demon, avoid the Karaoke Banshee's ear-piercing shrieks, or sneak past the Mini-Boss Copay Crawler without getting caught? Probably not.
lore.warning: Be warned: the Supervisor on Line Zero is watching your every move, and they won't hesitate to call in a Security Wraith to put an end to your detention... and your life. Don't say we didn't warn you.
lore.boss_intro:
(The sound of muffled screams and fluorescent lights flickering ominously fill the air as you approach the detention pit's central control room.)

Supervisor on Line Zero: (sighing dramatically) Ah, another "hero" seeking to escape this wretched abyss. How... thrilling.

(They emerge from the shadows, a shrill whistle piercing the air as they take their position behind a desk cluttered with dusty files and broken coffee cups.)

Supervisor on Line Zero: Welcome to my domain, where the unwashed masses are sent to rot in obscurity. You should feel right at home.

Their eyes, red-rimmed from too much overtime, gleam with malevolent intent as they lean forward, voice dripping with sarcasm.

Supervisor on Line Zero: I'll be watching your every move, noting each mistake, and cataloging each failure for the inevitable "disciplinary review" that will never come. So, do try to enjoy yourselves while you can... (smirking) before I send you all straight to the pit of despair that awaits you outside these walls.

They lean
lore.sponsor_message: "At GrimCo Mop Sciences, we're thrilled to be the official cleaning solution of 'Dungeon Delirium'! Our Blood-Adjacent Floor Care Foam is specifically designed for areas with... enthusiastic participant turnover. With its unique enzyme blend and soothing aroma, you'll forget all about the gruesome goings-on in this treacherous tomb. Trust us, your floors (and your conscience) will thank you. GrimCo: cleaning up after others' mistakes, one bloody step at a time!"
lore.victory_recap:
"Victory! On Floor 3, the infamous High School After-Hours Detention Pit, Crawler has emerged victorious against the tyrannical Supervisor on Line Zero.

This behemoth of boredom and paperwork was no match for our IT Department Survivor's expert knowledge of keyboard shortcuts and creative uses of the F5 key. Armed with nothing but a trusty stapler and an unwavering disdain for bureaucracy, Crawler dodged the supervisor's relentless barrage of performance reviews and memos to mow down.

With a triumphant cry of 'System Update Required,' Crawler administered the coup de grâce, deleting the supervisor's very existence from the server. The pit fell silent, awaiting the next victim... err, adventurer."
